items.title: 2026 Special Olympics USA Games: How to watch, live updates and more
items.summary: The 2026 Special Olympics USA Games take place in Minneapolis June 20-26, with nearly 3,000 athletes from all 50 states competing.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: Spain have Lamine Yamal back -- and they finally l...
items.summary: After a shaky start to the World Cup, Spain beat Saudi Arabia and finally looked like a top team, thanks to Lamine Yamal.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Serena to play in Wimbledon singles as wild card
items.summary: Serena Williams will compete in the Wimbledon ladies' singles as a wild card, the Grand Slam tournament announced Sunday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
